source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage to Crane/Lifting Equipment

context.region: Gulf of Mexico, Mississippi Canyon Block 520

event.top_event: Loss of Load Control - Dropped Cleanout Assembly
actions_taken: Safety stand down ordered at 11:20 hours
Safety meeting held with drill and crane crews
BSEE NOD Accident Investigator requested video footage
event.summary: On 07-JUN-2023 at 11:00 hours, a 43-foot cleanout assembly fell approximately 40 feet onto the pipe skate during drilling operations on the Diamond Ocean BlackHornet Drillship at MC 520. The incident was caused by incorrect elevator inserts being installed (5-7/8 inch inserts instead of 4-1/2 inch inserts required for Internal-External Upset pipe). The Driller and Assistant Driller failed to follow procedures and did not complete the Elevator Pre-use Checklist. A floor hand was present in the red zone during the incident but was not injured. Property damage included 2 hoses and a portable ladder valued at $500.
recommendations: Ensure Elevator Pre-use Checklist (CHKL/001) is completed before all lifting operations
Implement positive checks including actual measurements of elevator inserts to override temporary marks
Designate Assistant Driller as responsible person for elevator pre-use inspections with verification by Driller
Verify correct insert size is installed in elevators before lifting operations
Physically measure internal bore of elevators to confirm correct size for tubular in use
Restrict personnel from red zones during lifting operations

threats.name: Personnel Positioning in Red Zone During Lift

controls.name: Elevator Pre-Use Checklist
controls.barrier_role: Verification of correct elevator insert size before lifting
controls.lod_basis: Primary control to prevent incorrect equipment use

supporting_text: Elevator Pre-Use Checklist (ref# CHKL/001) was not filled out for this operation
Due to the Driller and Assistant Driller not following the guidelines, procedures and not filling out the checklist, the incorrect inserts were used in the elevators

controls.name: Visual Inspection of Elevator Insert Installation
controls.barrier_role: Verification that correct inserts are properly installed with safety retention pins

supporting_text: The Assistant Driller conducted a visual inspection of the insert change and verified the installation was done correctly, with the safety retention pins properly installed
The Assistant Driller took a glance at the size and observed 4-1/2 inch stamped on the inserts and continued back into the driller's shack

controls.name: Actual Measurement of Elevator Inserts
controls.barrier_role: Positive check using actual measurements to override temporary marks
controls.lod_basis: Guideline 5.1.4.8.a requires positive checks with actual measurements

supporting_text: Procedures will include positive checks, i.e., actual measurements, which override any temporary marks on equipment
Physically measure the internal bore of the elevators to confirm that the elevators are the correct size for the tubular in use

controls.name: Driller Verification of Elevator Pre-Use Checklist
controls.barrier_role: Supervisory verification that checklist has been completed to satisfaction
controls.lod_basis: Driller responsibility to verify checks and confirm correct elevators selected

supporting_text: It is the Driller's responsibility to verify that the above checks have been carried out to his satisfaction, the correct elevators have been selected, and that they are fit for purpose
The Driller did not verify that the Elevator Pre-use Checklist was carried out to his satisfaction

controls.name: Assistant Driller Responsibility for Elevator Inspection
controls.barrier_role: Designated responsibility for conducting elevator pre-use checks
controls.lod_basis: Guideline 5.1.4.8.a designates Assistant Driller as responsible person

supporting_text: Designate the Assistant Driller as the responsible person to carry out the checks
The Assistant Driller was not aware of his responsibility to ensure that the Elevator Pre-use Checklist was completed

controls.name: Red Zone Exclusion During Lifting Operations
controls.barrier_role: Prevention of personnel exposure to dropped load hazard
controls.lod_basis: Standard practice to exclude personnel from hazard zones during lifting

supporting_text: There was one floor hand in the red zone at the time of the incident
The floor hand holding a remote control for the pipe skate and standing just a few feet away from the pipe skate in the red zone
the floor hand stepped closer to the pipe skate to get a better line of site of the cleanout assembly being lifted

controls.name: Toolbox Talk Prior to Lifting Operations
controls.barrier_role: Communication of lifting procedures and hazards to crew
controls.lod_basis: Pre-job safety briefing to ensure crew awareness

supporting_text: At 07:00 hours, a toolbox talk was held with the Diamond drill crew, crane crew, and Schlumberger service hand for picking up the cleanout assembly

controls.name: Safety Stand Down and Post-Incident Review
controls.barrier_role: Immediate response to incident with crew safety meeting

supporting_text: At 11:20 hours, a safety stand down was ordered by the Diamond Captain
Both drill and crane crews had a safety meeting in the Driller's shack regarding on the incident and about moving forward

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
